note: accumulateUsageByAttempt (internal/app/usage.go) now keys the by_attempt map by stage+\x00+attempt_id instead of attempt_id alone, so execute attempt_001 and fix attempt_001 no longer merge into one row; the row's attempt_id field still carries the bare ID, with stage distinguishing colliding IDs. Added TestUsagePerRunByAttemptStageScopedKeys.

usageBreakdownDetail (internal/app/usage.go) now appends '(N calls: usage not reported)' when a captured row also has uncaptured calls, so a mixed row keeps its captured token counts but flags the unreported remainder instead of silently dropping it. Added TestUsageMixedCapturedRowAnnotatesUnreported.

mapConfigHash (internal/app/map.go) now hashes codeindex.NormalizeMode(m.CodeIndex) — the same normalization projectmap.Scan applies — so the hash reflects the normalized map config: aliases and the empty default that all fold to 'auto' produce the same hash and no longer falsely invalidate the map.

Same fix as f_001: accumulateUsageByAttempt now keys by stage+attempt_id, so per-run by_attempt aggregation keeps execute attempt_001 and fix attempt_001 as separate rows with correct per-stage stage/agent/provider metadata and unsummed tokens.
Same fix as f_008: usageBreakdownDetail annotates the uncaptured remainder of a mixed captured/uncaptured human breakdown row with '(N calls: usage not reported)'.

docs/backlog.md: the 'Loop stop conditions' and 'Cost/budget remaining slices' bullets no longer document the token budget stop / budget_exceeded as shipped — both now record it as removed in M25.1, returning later denominated in effective units. The 'Config + usage polish slice' entry is marked '(M25.1, shipped)' instead of 'next after the symbol-search slice'.

docs/loop-architecture-design.md: the budget-stop bullet (line 193), the alignment-table row, the motivation declared-config list, and the 'budget block are declared' line no longer present review.budget.mode / review.budget.max_tokens as live config. Each now states the review.budget placeholder was removed in M25.1 and is rejected if present, with the designed budget stop's home in cost-budget-design.md.
